title: task
description: Policy: appendix-c-safety.md. Add -fsanitize=cfi -fvisibility=hidden when Clang 18+ detected. Blocks ROP/JOP attacks.
close_reason: Added CMake version check for Clang 18+ in lichen/zephyr/CMakeLists.txt. When detected, enables CFI hardening flags (-fsanitize=cfi -fvisibility=hidden). Follows spec/appendix-c-safety.md policy.
